1.	Tradition and heritage are vitally important to the survival of people and cultures. Do you agree or disagree with this statement? Explain your answer by comparing and contrasting examples from Human Planet and/or Whale Rider.

Tradition and heritage are very important for the survival of people and culture. First, tradition mean way of acting that people in a particular society or group have countined to follow for a long time .in this modern world some of the society would still follow these traditions such as the Chinese new year and christmas, but some of that has fallen into desuetude. Also there are heritage to prove that the tradition had existence and also it can let us learn the old times tradition. In this essay we will talk about why it is important by the Hofsted’s culture dimension theory and how tradition effect today’s culture.
Introduction

Traditional festival can least the survival of people. Sometimes tradition doesn’t mean a to eat some good food it could be some weird rule but sometimes because rule a let a whole village to survival. In the hosfted’s culture dimension, this tradition can have restraint the people for not over indulgence. For example, in the Human Planet section the whale hunting tribes, they use a tradition weapon to hunt whale and it is harpoon, 1A harpoon is a long spear-like instrument and tool used in fishing, whaling, sealing, and other marine hunting to catch large fish or marine mammals such as whales, As the earliest known harpoons, these weapons were made and used 90,000 years ago,They only hunting 6 whales for a year and it won’t harm the ecosystem, can see that they only take what the need can show they are not greedy.in this case show that, the heritage is very important for people to survive of people. Another example for comparing the whale hunting tribes is also from the Human Planet section, it is Dogon people of Mali, people in there have an issue of water and food. It is the edge of Sahara and there is very little water, but there is a lake come and go every year. 2There is a traditional event and it is an annual festival, in this festival people run into water and fishing from a small lake, thousands travel long distances to take part in event. Eventually they wait for the signal and fishing together. It can show that they won’t quietly to fishing there alone and before the race begin, they have show the restraint to against the tradition. That is why tradition and heritage are very important for survival of people and today’s cultures. Let’s talk about the masculinity and femininity in the next paragraph.
Paragraph 1

Traditional culture effect today’s masculinity and femininity society, can see how important the past have effect the culture, that’s why the tradition culture is important. We can take the example from the Whale rider movie and Human Planet. First, in the whale rider movie tells the fictional story of Pai, 3a twelve-year-old girl living with her grandparents in the small community of Whangara on the coast of New Zealand. The Whangara believe their people date back to a single ancestor, Paikea, who survived when his boat capsized in the middle of the ocean by riding to shore on the back of a whale. Since Paikea’s time, the Whangara people have lived in a patriarchal structure where tribal chiefs can only be first-born males. It can show that the traditional culture has a very masculinity problem, that has changed the modern society to let more female more power so it create a new culture call gender equality. This can make our culture better, also can show that how tradition isvery important. There is also similar example in the BBC Human Planet section, the Tubu bo women can show that they will teach the female kid to survive,4 Foni and her 10-year-old daughter Shede are in search of a water well in the middle of the desert, which is just one square meter in size. Foni knows how to navigate the desert without a map or a compass, having learned this skill from her ancestors. The Tubu women are able to follow the sand ridges to help work out in which direction they should go. It show that even women are being teaching is this culture instead of the Whale rider movie’s Koro, he in too attached to the make culture we can compare the different between those, but those are still important the the modern culture.
Paragraph 2

In conclusion, these point show that how important a tradition culture are, these tradition have lots of contributions for the modern society. Lots of proof are list from the Human Planet and the Whale rider, both of them are showing that the tradition are a stepping rock to a successful culture, and define by the hofsted dimenion.
完

replies.msg:
因為篇野感覺好technical, 我淨係試下comment依段
Tradition and heritage are very important for the survival of people and culture.
依句同條題目基本上一樣, 所以冇問題

First, Tradition means the way of acting that people in a particular society or group have continued to follow for a long [period of] time.
-個first可以delete左, 因為後面冇second, third, then做對比
-有冇-s 就放入google doc check下 (利申, 我都成日miss左)

In thisthe modern world some of the societies would still follow these certain traditions such as [the] Chinese new year and Christmas, but while some of that these / the traditions have fallen into desuetude.
其實好多都係singular plural既問題, 仲有article, this/that依類
香港學生好常犯既錯, 自己aware多少少會改到
general statement唔會用would

Also there are heritages to prove which prove that the tradition had existence certain tradition existed in the past and also. It can let us learn the old times tradition. (These heritages can be useful [for us] to learn / understand those ancient tradition)
依句比較重廣東話味
小心斷句同埋出現左2個also

In this essay we will talk about why it is important by according to the Hofsted’s culture dimension theory and how tradition effect affects / impacts today’s culture.
effect vs affect依個小心
不過我個人口味prefer "impact"

Don’t be grammar nazi
This is not much important

考咩試有唔同既寫法
我估係DSE?

大問題
寫得唔簡潔
例如 very important 可以用crucial essential paramount
同一個字用左好多次會睇到好攰
punchline 係咁用tradition開頭我跟唔倒你講緊咩

細位例如有時SVO會食左一樣 寫essay/article用簡寫大忌
clause駁得太長等等
太覺眼我改既會由最高4開始扣落去

改善方法 同一個字唔可以用超過兩次
可以用5個字寫完就唔好用10個字
SVO唔可以錯
essay唔好再寫doesn't won't ...'s
除非DSE改左marking如果唔係佢地會捉
